title: Gandhi My Father
desc: The turbulent and troubled life of Gandhi's son, Harilal, who at once tried to support his father's ideology, while simultaneously trying to create a life for himself, separate from his family name.

title: Diary Of A Butterfly
desc: Gul, an aspiring model, wants to make it big in the fashion industry and decides to leave no stone unless turned to achieve success. However, she soon realises that success comes at a price

title: Desi Boyz
desc: A comedy-drama film about two friends, who lose their jobs during the recession. They decide to become male escorts to make ends meet, hiding their new profession from their families. However, their lives become more complicated when they fall in love and have to deal with the consequences of their new careers. Their lives take a turn when their secret is exposed, leading to a series of comical situations and misunderstandings.

title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
desc: To pursue his love interest, TV reporter Geeta, Raju misleads the police with false clues during a murder investigation. His lies soon land him in trouble with the police and the mafia.

title: Lajja
desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?
